lexis 0.1.0
  • Reference

Search for words matching a pattern

Source: R/lookup.R
lex_search.Rd

Returns words in lexis_wide whose word form matches a regular expression. Useful for finding all words starting with a string, all words ending in a suffix, etc.

lex_search(pattern, ignore_case = TRUE, cols = NULL)

Arguments

pattern

character. A regular expression (passed to grepl).

ignore_case

logical. If TRUE (default), case-insensitive matching.

cols

character vector or NULL. Columns to return from lexis_wide. If NULL (default), returns word and lemma only.

Value

A tibble of matching words with the requested columns.

Examples

lex_search("^un")       # words starting with "un"
#> # A tibble: 1,989 × 2
#>    word          lemma       
#>    <chr>         <chr>       
#>  1 understand    understand  
#>  2 uncle         uncle       
#>  3 unit          unit        
#>  4 unbelievable  unbelievable
#>  5 universe      universe    
#>  6 uniform       uniform     
#>  7 unusual       unusual     
#>  8 university    university  
#>  9 understanding understand  
#> 10 union         union       
#> # ℹ 1,979 more rows
lex_search("ness$")     # words ending in "-ness"
#> # A tibble: 1,825 × 2
#>    word          lemma        
#>    <chr>         <chr>        
#>  1 business      business     
#>  2 witness       witness      
#>  3 goodness      goodness     
#>  4 happiness     happiness    
#>  5 darkness      darkness     
#>  6 highness      highness     
#>  7 kindness      kindness     
#>  8 weakness      weakness     
#>  9 madness       madness      
#> 10 consciousness consciousness
#> # ℹ 1,815 more rows
lex_search("^[aeiou]")  # words starting with a vowel
#> # A tibble: 10,239 × 2
#>    word       lemma     
#>    <chr>      <chr>     
#>  1 other      other     
#>  2 old        old       
#>  3 ask        ask       
#>  4 understand understand
#>  5 excuse     excuse    
#>  6 idea       idea      
#>  7 use        use       
#>  8 open       open      
#>  9 alone      alone     
#> 10 end        end       
#> # ℹ 10,229 more rows
